title: roccardia cotula
intro: Roccardia cotula, also known as kidneywort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Crassulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of kidney and urinary tract issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Roccardia cotula include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with cystitis, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
